TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Sakizaya Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://szy.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy, title = {Sakizaya Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: == cakay == Ť≤∑ siwkay nu cakay cakay sa, sikalisiw saca pida' mibalic tu canacanan(tuutuud), malecad ku tadamaan . tinaku a kamu cakayan 1.ŤĘęŤ≤∑ cakayan tu nu tau kiya kazizeng. cakayen 1.ŚéĽŤ≤∑ cakayen ku tayu! macakay 1.ŤĘęŤ≤∑ macakay nu maku ku lami'. mapacakay 1.ŤĘęŤ≥£ mapacakay kiya wawelwel nu maku. mapacakayan 1.ŤĘęŤ≥£šļÜ mapacakayan tu kiya kazizeng. micakay 1.ŚéĽŤ≤∑ micakay henay kaku tu padingad. pacakay 1.Ť≥£Ôľõťä∑ŚĒģ pacakay tu lami' kaku i iciba. pacakayan 1.Ť≥£Śļó pacakayan tu cudad ku luma' nu maku. pacakayay 1.ťä∑ŚĒģÁöĄ pacakayay ku kakawaw nu cabay aku. pacakayen 1.śčŅŚéĽťä∑ŚĒģśéČ pacakayen kina kalitang! picakayan 1.ŚłāŚ†ī timamuwang sa ku tademaw i tiza picakayan tu lami'. pipacakayan 1.Ť≥£Ś†ī yadah ku canacanan i pipacakayan. u sulit nu Amilika Purchasing refers to a business or organization attempting to acquire goods or services to accomplish its goals. Alhough there are several organizations that attempt to set standards in the purchasing process, processes can vary greatly between organizations. Typically the word "purchasing" is not used interchangeably with the word "procurement", since procurement typically includes expediting, supplier quality, and transportation and logistics in addition to purchasing.
S.PHON: == ¶akaj == * siwkaj nu ¶akaj ¶akaj sa, sikar~…ĺisiw sa ¶a pida Ē~ ° mibar~…ĺi ¶ tu ¶ana ¶anan(tuutuud), mar~…ĺ…ô ¶ad ku tadamaan . tinaku a kamu ¶akajan *.** ¶akajan tu nu tau kija kaziz…ôŇč. ¶akaj…ôn *.** ¶akaj…ôn ku taju! ma ¶akaj *.** ma ¶akaj nu maku ku r~…ĺami Ē~ °. mapa ¶akaj *.** mapa ¶akaj kija waw…ôr~…ĺw…ôr~…ĺ nu maku. mapa ¶akajan *.*** mapa ¶akajan tu kija kaziz…ôŇč. mi ¶akaj *.** mi ¶akaj ńß…ônaj kaku tu padiŇčad. pa ¶akaj *.**** pa ¶akaj tu r~…ĺami Ē~ ° kaku i i ¶iba. pa ¶akajan *.** pa ¶akajan tu ¶udad ku r~…ĺuma Ē~ ° nu maku. pa ¶akajaj *.*** pa ¶akajaj ku kakawaw nu ¶abaj aku. pa ¶akaj…ôn *.***** pa ¶akaj…ôn kina kar~…ĺitaŇč! pi ¶akajan *.** timamuwaŇč sa ku tad…ômaw i tiza pi ¶akajan tu r~…ĺami Ē~ °. pipa ¶akajan *.** jadańß ku ¶ana ¶anan i pipa ¶akajan. u sur~…ĺit nu amir~…ĺika pur ¶ńßasiŇč r…ôf…ôrs to a busin…ôss or organization att…ômptiŇč to a ¶*uir…ô goods or s…ôr*i ¶…ôs to a ¶ ¶ompr~…ĺisńß its goar~…ĺs. ar~…ĺńßougńß tńß…ôr…ô ar…ô s…ô*…ôrar~…ĺ organizations tńßat att…ômpt to s…ôt standards in tńß…ô pur ¶ńßasiŇč pro ¶…ôss, pro ¶…ôss…ôs ¶an *arj gr…ôatr~…ĺj b…ôtw…ô…ôn organizations. tjpi ¶ar~…ĺr~…ĺj tńß…ô word "pur ¶ńßasiŇč" is not us…ôd int…ôr ¶ńßaŇč…ôabr~…ĺj witńß tńß…ô word "pro ¶ur…ôm…ônt", sin ¶…ô pro ¶ur…ôm…ônt tjpi ¶ar~…ĺr~…ĺj in ¶r~…ĺud…ôs …ô*p…ôditiŇč, suppr~…ĺi…ôr *uar~…ĺitj, and transportation and r~…ĺogisti ¶s in addition to pur ¶ńßasiŇč.
S.FORM: == cakay == Ť≤∑ siwkay nu cakay cakay sa, sikalisiw saca pida' mibalic tu canacanan(tuutuud), malecad ku tadamaan . tinaku a kamu cakayan 1.ŤĘęŤ≤∑ cakayan tu nu tau kiya kazizeng. cakayen 1.ŚéĽŤ≤∑ cakayen ku tayu! macakay 1.ŤĘęŤ≤∑ macakay nu maku ku lami'. mapacakay 1.ŤĘęŤ≥£ mapacakay kiya wawelwel nu maku. mapacakayan 1.ŤĘęŤ≥£šļÜ mapacakayan tu kiya kazizeng. micakay 1.ŚéĽŤ≤∑ micakay henay kaku tu padingad. pacakay 1.Ť≥£Ôľõťä∑ŚĒģ pacakay tu lami' kaku i iciba. pacakayan 1.Ť≥£Śļó pacakayan tu cudad ku luma' nu maku. pacakayay 1.ťä∑ŚĒģÁöĄ pacakayay ku kakawaw nu cabay aku. pacakayen 1.śčŅŚéĽťä∑ŚĒģśéČ pacakayen kina kalitang! picakayan 1.ŚłāŚ†ī timamuwang sa ku tademaw i tiza picakayan tu lami'. pipacakayan 1.Ť≥£Ś†ī yadah ku canacanan i pipacakayan. u sulit nu Amilika Purchasing refers to a business or organization attempting to acquire goods or services to accomplish its goals. Alhough there are several organizations that attempt to set standards in the purchasing process, processes can vary greatly between organizations. Typically the word "purchasing" is not used interchangeably with the word "procurement", since procurement typically includes expediting, supplier quality, and transportation and logistics in addition to purchasing.
S.PHON: == ¶akaj == * siwkaj nu ¶akaj ¶akaj sa, sikar~…ĺisiw sa ¶a pida Ē~ ° mibar~…ĺi ¶ tu ¶ana ¶anan(tuutuud), mar~…ĺ…ô ¶ad ku tadamaan . tinaku a kamu ¶akajan *.** ¶akajan tu nu tau kija kaziz…ôŇč. ¶akaj…ôn *.** ¶akaj…ôn ku taju! ma ¶akaj *.** ma ¶akaj nu maku ku r~…ĺami Ē~ °. mapa ¶akaj *.** mapa ¶akaj kija waw…ôr~…ĺw…ôr~…ĺ nu maku. mapa ¶akajan *.*** mapa ¶akajan tu kija kaziz…ôŇč. mi ¶akaj *.** mi ¶akaj ńß…ônaj kaku tu padiŇčad. pa ¶akaj *.**** pa ¶akaj tu r~…ĺami Ē~ ° kaku i i ¶iba. pa ¶akajan *.** pa ¶akajan tu ¶udad ku r~…ĺuma Ē~ ° nu maku. pa ¶akajaj *.*** pa ¶akajaj ku kakawaw nu ¶abaj aku. pa ¶akaj…ôn *.***** pa ¶akaj…ôn kina kar~…ĺitaŇč! pi ¶akajan *.** timamuwaŇč sa ku tad…ômaw i tiza pi ¶akajan tu r~…ĺami Ē~ °. pipa ¶akajan *.** jadańß ku ¶ana ¶anan i pipa ¶akajan. u sur~…ĺit nu amir~…ĺika pur ¶ńßasiŇč r…ôf…ôrs to a busin…ôss or organization att…ômptiŇč to a ¶*uir…ô goods or s…ôr*i ¶…ôs to a ¶ ¶ompr~…ĺisńß its goar~…ĺs. ar~…ĺńßougńß tńß…ôr…ô ar…ô s…ô*…ôrar~…ĺ organizations tńßat att…ômpt to s…ôt standards in tńß…ô pur ¶ńßasiŇč pro ¶…ôss, pro ¶…ôss…ôs ¶an *arj gr…ôatr~…ĺj b…ôtw…ô…ôn organizations. tjpi ¶ar~…ĺr~…ĺj tńß…ô word "pur ¶ńßasiŇč" is not us…ôd int…ôr ¶ńßaŇč…ôabr~…ĺj witńß tńß…ô word "pro ¶ur…ôm…ônt", sin ¶…ô pro ¶ur…ôm…ônt tjpi ¶ar~…ĺr~…ĺj in ¶r~…ĺud…ôs …ô*p…ôditiŇč, suppr~…ĺi…ôr *uar~…ĺitj, and transportation and r~…ĺogisti ¶s in addition to pur ¶ńßasiŇč.
